title: Dow named among of the "PEOPLE Companies that Care®" for 3rd Consecutive Year
text: MIDLAND, Mich. , Aug. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dow (NYSE: DOW) has been named one of the 2022 PEOPLE Companies that Care by Great Place to Work® and PEOPLE, ranking 92 on the list of 100 companies, marking the third consecutive year the Company has earned a spot on this prestigious list.

title: Dow stock dives after KeyBanc says ‘petrochemical recession is upon us'
text: Shares of Dow Inc. dropped Monday, after KeyBanc Capital analyst Aleksey Yefremov turned bearish on the chemicals and specialty materials company, citing concerns that the “meaningful” exposure to commodities and Europe skews the risk-versus-reward profile to the downside.

title: Dow wins six 2022 R&D 100 Awards
text: Marks Company's 11th consecutive year making the list; over that timeframe has earned more awards than any other company Company also received a Special Recognition for Corporate Social Responsibility MIDLAND, Mich. , Aug. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dow (NYSE: DOW) has rounded out the 2022 R&D 100 Awards, a signature program of R&D Magazine, with a total of six winners and one special recognition.

title: Blue Chip Stock Moves Lower on Downgrade
text: Dow  Inc  ( NYSE:DOW) received a downgrade from Keybanc to "underweight" from "sector weight" this morning, with the brokerage expecting continued downside in U.S. polyethylene (PE) prices.
